title: stevia riedelii
intro:
Stevia rebaudiana, not Stevia riedelii, is the correct scientific name for the plant in question. However, I can provide information on the actual Stevia rebaudiana plant. 

Stevia rebaudiana is a plant native to South America, commonly known as sweet leaf or sugar leaf due to its sweet taste. 

It is used as a natural sweetener due to its glycosides, primarily steviol and stevioside, which are 200-300 times sweeter than sugar. 

The medicinal properties of Stevia rebaudiana include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.

The health benefits of Stevia rebaudiana include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve oral health, and help manage type 2 diabetes. 

Herbal preparations of Stevia rebaudiana include teas, extracts, and supplements, which can be used in various forms to incorporate the plant's benefits into one's diet.
